plan_name: SSE Artifact Events and FTS File Operations Rebuild

tasks.name: Task 1: Add FileWritten, FileEdited, GitCommit variants to SseEvent enum
tasks.notes: Added 3 new variants with event_type() and to_json_data() arms. Module doc updated to 7 event types. Clean compile.

tasks.name: Task 2: Integrate artifact event emission and FTS file_operations rebuild into watcher_loop
tasks.notes: Query-based approach: snapshot max(id) before sync, query new rows after sync. FTS timer now rebuilds both message content and file_operations indexes. Added rusqlite re-export import and explicit type annotations on conn.call closures to resolve inference ambiguity.

deviations.description: Added explicit -> Result<_, rusqlite::Error> return type annotations on all new conn.call closures in watcher.rs. Multiple From<rusqlite::Error> impls in scope (ApiError, DbError, DecomposeError, SchemaError, SyncError, tokio_rusqlite::Error) caused type inference ambiguity E0283. This is the same pattern needed by existing closures in the server crate but was not anticipated by the plan.

Added 'use tokio_rusqlite::rusqlite;' import to watcher.rs for rusqlite::params! macro and return type annotations. Server crate does not depend on rusqlite directly per decision [03-01]; accessed via tokio_rusqlite re-export.
